patterns.name: Azure Storage Account Key
patterns.risk: Full read/write access to all containers and blobs in the storage account.
patterns.fix: Use Azure Managed Identity, SAS tokens with minimal scope, or AZURE_STORAGE_KEY env var.

patterns.name: Azure AD Client Secret
patterns.description: Azure Active Directory application client secret
patterns.risk: Can authenticate as the application and access all resources the app registration has permissions for.
patterns.fix: Use AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET env var or Azure Key Vault.

patterns.name: Azure Service Connection String
patterns.description: Azure service connection string containing credentials
patterns.risk: Direct access to Azure services (Storage, Service Bus, Cosmos DB, etc.).
patterns.fix: Use Azure Key Vault or environment variables for connection strings.

patterns.name: Azure SAS Token
patterns.description: Azure Shared Access Signature token (may be time-limited)
patterns.risk: Grants scoped access to Azure resources. Risk depends on scope and expiry.
patterns.fix: SAS tokens should be generated at runtime with minimal scope and short expiry.
